entry.message: [xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.010514. - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\WORL_instance_2024_2025.xml
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0085.9361 - 12:03:59.398262 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\WORL_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\WORL_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\WORL_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0085.9361] The element DeferredTaxAssetsNet appears in the face financial statements of the filing. This element is a footnote concept that should only be used in a footnote disclosure. To report the value of deferred taxes on the balance sheet either the element DeferredIncomeTaxAssetsNet or DeferredIncomeTaxLiabilitiesNet should be used depending if it is a liability or an asset. If the value of DeferredTaxAssetsNet is the same as the value for DeferredIncomeTaxAssetsNet or DeferredIncomeTaxLiabilitiesNet, then one of these balance sheet elements should be used on the balance sheet and not the footnote element DeferredTaxAssetsNet.
Rule Element Id:9361 Rule version: 29.0.2 - WORL_instance_2024_2025.xml 626

property.name: label
property.value: Document Type
